notes: In-panel self-update is now live: the worker exposes /admin/update-check.json and /admin/self-update.json, so the panel's Update section can check the latest version and redeploy the worker in place (bindings, secrets, and D1 are preserved). Plus hot-path optimizations — per-isolate caches (Cloudflare usage, MD5, SHA-224, auto_key, clean-IP CIDR lists), parallelized per-user usage reads and clean-IP DNS resolution (kept under the free-plan subrequest cap), a cold-isolate kill-switch fix, and assorted correctness fixes. All backward compatible; existing installs upgrade with no config changes.
